description_long: This swivel chair features a modern, rounded design with a wide, curved seat and a matching contoured backrest, both upholstered in a dark fabric. The seat and backrest are framed by a visible wooden shell, adding a touch of warmth and sophistication to the overall appearance. The chair is supported by a black, five-star metal base equipped with casters for easy mobility. A central support column connects the seat to the base and includes a visible adjustment lever, likely for height adjustment. The chair lacks armrests, emphasizing its minimalist and open design. The combination of wood, fabric, and metal materials gives it a contemporary yet inviting look suitable for urban interiors.
description: A modern swivel chair with a curved wooden shell, dark upholstered seat and back, and a black metal base with casters. It has a minimalist design with no armrests and a visible adjustment lever.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, curved seat and backrest with dark upholstery framed by wood, and the five-legged base with casters.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the pronounced curvature of the seat and backrest, the wooden shell, and the central support column with adjustment lever.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full wooden shell of the backrest, the black support column, and the five-star base with casters.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizes the depth of the seat and backrest, the wood grain, and the chair's overall sleek profile.
attribute_central_support_column: Black metal cylindrical column with a telescoping mechanism and a visible adjustment lever.
attribute_seat_back_design: Wide, rounded, and contoured backrest with dark fabric upholstery and a smooth wooden shell, no visible patterns or cutouts.
